candidate_nulls.SIGN_INVERSION: Same times, costs and path; side flipped.
candidate_nulls.FIVE_SESSION_SIGNAL_DELAY: Same side and local clocks on the fifth later eligible session; invalid roll/gap windows skipped.
candidate_nulls.OPPORTUNITY_COUNT_MATCHED_NON_SIGNAL_DAY: Earliest later eligible non-signal session without reuse, same local clocks and frozen side sequence; invalid roll/gap windows skipped.

SIM_EXPLOIT_definition: base expectancy strictly positive and stress-2x expectancy non-positive
CONTRE: The non-signal control matches clock and count but not every latent macro announcement; beating it is necessary but not causal identification.
